data.title: A Continuous Treatment Study of JNS019 (Topiramate) in Migraine Patients
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to evaluate the safety and efficacy of topiramate in participants with migraine (type of severe headache that occurs periodically and is often associated with nausea, vomiting and constipation or diarrhea) who completed the JNS019-JPN-02 study.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

\- Participants who completed the JNS019-JPN-02 study or discontinued the study at Week 4 or after in fixed-dose period because of insufficient efficacy

Exclusion Criteria:

* Participants who discontinued the JNS019-JPN-02 study for an adverse event unrelated to the underlying
endpoints: Number of Participants With Adverse Events
